updateNote: Day 72 12:03 PM PT refresh — Iran formally responds to US 14-point peace proposal via Pakistan mediator (no nuclear weapon, halt enrichment 12 years, Hormuz security). IRGC: 'missiles and drones locked on American targets.' Netanyahu on 60 Minutes: enriched uranium 'must be physically removed.' Day 71: IDF struck 85+ Hezbollah targets in Lebanon — at least 39 killed (most intense since ceasefire). Hezbollah drone wounded 3 IDF reservists at Misgav Am. WSJ exclusive: Israel built secret base in Iraq's western desert. UK announces destroyer for separate UK-France-led Hormuz mission. Tanker crosses Hormuz first time in days; ~2,000 ships stranded, 22,500 mariners trapped. Brent $101.26 (+26.8%), WTI $95.42 (+26.4%). Gas $4.522 (+48.3%). Iranian rial 1,799,000 IRR/USD all-time low; inflation tops 100%. Hormuz Day 69.
dataFreshnessWarning: Data current as of 12:03 PM PT, May 10, 2026 (Day 72). Iran's formal peace response delivered May 10 via Pakistan; awaiting US assessment.
